◎简　　介  

　　Alice and Paul both study at the Sorbonne University in the Latin Quarter. After a course, Paul who is attracted to Alice , starts talking with her. They share the same ideas about philosophy and today's philosophers but while they go on with their conversation they realize that as far as cinema is concerned they are not at all on the same wavelength: she is all for the New Wav...
